items.title: Much respect to @tokengobbler who shutdown Vibe-kanban live onstage at AIE Europe
items.title_zh: 非常尊重@tokengobbler，他在 AIE Europe 的舞台上现场关闭了 Vibe-kanban
items.description: Much respect to @tokengobbler who shutdown Vibe-kanban live onstage at AIE Europe - still with 30,000 MAU, and still living on as an open source project. "Everyone who is making money is doing 2 things: selling to enterprise, and reselling…
items.description_zh: 非常感谢@tokengobbler，他在 AIE Europe 的舞台上关闭了 Vibe-kanban - 仍然拥有 30,000 MAU，并且仍然作为一个开源项目存在。 “每个赚钱的人都在做两件事：卖给企业，以及转售……

items.title: Too many funds are capping downside right now, instead of maximizing upside..
items.title_zh: 现在太多的基金正在限制下行空间，而不是最大化上行空间。
items.description: Too many funds are capping downside right now, instead of maximizing upside.. I’ll often ask the GP/partner on why they did the deal and on my fifth why the real reason comes out which is “well at least big token factory will acquire them…
items.description_zh: 现在太多的基金正在限制下行空间，而不是最大化上行空间。我经常会问普通合伙人/合作伙伴他们为什么要做这笔交易，而在我的第五个问题上，真正的原因是“至少大型代币工厂会收购它们......”

items.title: This one fixes the depenency issues/slowness some had when installed via npm.
items.title_zh: 这修复了一些通过 npm 安装时出现的依赖问题/缓慢问题。
items.description: This one fixes the depenency issues/slowness some had when installed via npm. Plugins are hard, worth it tho! Package is way leaner now, we moved [almost] everything into extensions! https://t.co/rp3Psd3sPF https://t.co/JFZ7xkbrnR
items.description_zh: 这修复了一些通过 npm 安装时出现的依赖问题/缓慢问题。插件很难，但值得！现在包变得更精简了，我们将[几乎]所有内容都移到了扩展中！ https://t.co/rp3Psd3sPF https://t.co/JFZ7xkbrnR
